title: elsholtzia ciliata var. ramosa
intro: Elsholtzia ciliata var. ramosa, also known as Vietnamese mint or rambai, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elsholtzia ciliata var. ramosa include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds. Elsholtzia ciliata var. ramosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in Southeast Asian traditional medicine.
